headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Airbnb, Bank Stocks, Dividend Aristocrats And More
summary: This weekend's Barron's offers the guidance of a variety of experts on what's ahead for the global economy and the markets.

headline: MicroStrategy Buys $50 Million Worth Of Bitcoin, Topping Up Holdings To $766M
summary: MicroStrategy Incorporated (NASDAQ: MSTR) has bought $50 million worth of Bitcoin in cash, the company’s CEO announced on Twitter.

headline: Notable Insider Buys of the Past Week: Foot Locker, Icahn Enterprises, Kraft Heinz And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors when markets face uncertainty.

This past week, some insiders added to their stakes in REITs, a specialty retailer and a packaged foods giant.

headline: CRISPR Therapeutics and Vertex Present New Data for Investigational CRISPR/Cas9 Gene-Editing Therapy, CTX001 at ASH, Together With Publication in NEJM
Gilead's Kite Announced  at ASH 2020, Yescarta is First CAR T-cell Therapy to Demonstrate High Response Rates and Durable Clinical Benefit in a Pivotal Indolent Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma Study
Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Amazon, Apple, Ford, GE, Palantir And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The week's bullish calls included the iPhone maker, the e-commerce colossus and a top airline.

headline: US Allows Deadline On TikTok Deal To Lapse, Talks To Continue
summary:
TikTok's future remains murky as the U.S. heads into a new presidential administration still with no final sale.

What Happened: The Trump administration did not extend the Friday night deadline for the forced sale of TikTok's U.S. assets, following two previous extentions.

headline: Tesla Describes Itself As 'Majority-Minority' Company In Its First US Diversity Report
summary: Elon Musk's Tesla Inc (NYSE: TSLA) published its first-ever diversity report on Friday.
